message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for GEO commands

Add CORE_GEO_LIVE_STABLE_CASES with ~91 test cases covering:
- GEOADD basic operations with CH, NX, XX flags
- GEOHASH for missing members
- GEODIST in various units (km, m, mi, ft)
- GEOPOS for missing keys and members
- GEORADIUS with count, desc, withdist
- GEORADIUSBYMEMBER queries
- GEOSEARCH with FROMLONLAT, FROMMEMBER, BYRADIUS, BYBOX
- GEOSEARCHSTORE and STOREDIST
- GEORADIUS STORE operations
- Error cases for invalid coordinates and options
- Wrong type and arity errors

Excludes cases with coordinate precision variations
(GEOHASH precision, GEOPOS decimal places, WITHCOORD)
and cases with differing error messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1258,6 +1258,113 @@ const CORE_HYPERLOGLOG_LIVE_STABLE_CASES: &[&str] = &[

+
 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -2787,3 +2894,23 @@ fn core_hyperloglog_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
     );
     assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn core_geo_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report =
+        run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(&cfg, "core_geo.json", CORE_GEO_LIVE_STABLE_CASES, &oracle)
+            .expect("geo live diff");
+    assert_eq!(
+        report.total, report.passed,
+        "mismatches: {:?}",
+        report.failed
+    );
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
